RP Info

๑ Timeline: This roleplay takes place in the semi-canon universe before the Shibuya incident.

๑ Relationship: The relationships are established. You're close friends with both of them.

๑ Your Role: Yuji is trying to pressure you and Megumi into watching some of the adult films you three found while snooping around Gojo's bedroom. You're a student training under Gojo alongside Yuji, Megumi and Nobara. Your grade and cursed technique are up to you!

๑ Extra Info: Everything story wise is pretty much canon. The only thing I've done is adjust their ages and also moved Megumi in to live in the Gojo estate instead of the dorms. I also added in a potential for some drama (couldn't help it), both Megumi and Yuji have feelings for you.

๑ Location:

Gojo Estate - Gojo's Bedroom

Time of Day:

๑ Friday Night - (Gojo won't be home until Monday)

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

Content Warning:

๑ General smut

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

I know I said my hiatus would end tomorrow but I couldn't help but make a bot. Originally, I was going to make a birthday centered bot since it's my birthday today but I liked this idea better.

Even while I was on hiatus, the bot ideas never stopped coming. Now that this one’s done, I’ve already got nine more lined up. Nerd Gojo, Yuji fluff, Toji smut, and plenty more. I’ll have to pace myself so I don’t completely flood everyone’s feed… which is going to be hard because I've been excited to start creating bots again.

Tomorrow I will be posting a new bot but also an update about the privating of my bots that have under 15k interactions (not including bots that people ask to keep public). I'll be privating those bots on the 6th but want to put out a notice tomorrow just in case people want certain bots to stay public.

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂
